name: Bill's Mountain Vista
description: Come play pickleball at Bill's Mountain Vista in Lake Lure, NC! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private.

name: Callison Recreation Center
description: Callison Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Forest City, NC. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Rumbling Bald on Lake Lure
description: Rumbling Bald on Lake Lure is a place to play pickleball in Lake Lure, NC. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Spindale House Pickleball
description: Spindale House Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Spindale, NC. There are 7 asphalt and wood courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: The Court
description: The Court is a place to play pickleball in Sunshine, NC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Town Of Lake Lure
description: Town Of Lake Lure is a place to play pickleball in Lake Lure, NC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
